text: Here is the great gospel mystery and the blessed offer of the gospel. God so loved the world that he gave his only-begotten Son. This gift of God to this fallen world is the most wonderful and amazing instance of his love. The Son of God was given as an atoning sacrifice, that whosoever believes in him might not perish under God's wrath, but have everlasting life.

The plainest reason why the Son of God is called the Word, seems to be, that as our words explain our minds to others, so was the Son of God sent in order to reveal his Father's mind to the world. In the beginning was the Word, with God, and the Word was God.

Christ is the Way, the Truth, and the Life. He is the Way; there is no coming to God the Father, but through him as Mediator. He is the Truth; all the promises of God are in him yea, and amen. He is the Life; he is the fountain of all spiritual and eternal life.
